arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs FCSB – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Romania to take on FCSB in their final fixture of the Europa League’s league phase. Ruben Amorim’s team remain unbeaten in Europe this season and will confirm their passage to the Round of 16 with a win this evening. arts.ttl: 'Trying to force him out' – Gary Neville makes Man Utd claim about Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's time at Manchester United is still uncertain, but Gary Neville is convinced that Ruben Amorim is trying to push the forward out of the club

arts.ttl: FCSB vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Romania to face FCSB for their final Europa League league phase game. A point for the Red Devils tonight should be enough to see them automatically progress into the knockout stages of the competition. Marcus Rashford hasn’t travelled with the squad and United will undoubtedly be trying to find a solution […] The post FCSB vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane destroys Marcus Rashford with brutal comment on Man Utd exile
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captain Roy Keane has pulled no punches with his latest assessment of Marcus Rashford's situation at Old Trafford, with the exiled striker still no closer to an exit before the transfer deadline

arts.ttl: 'How dare they' - Alan Shearer enraged at Man United chiefs and makes Ruben Amorim claim
arts.sum: Alan Shearer and Gary Lineker have delivered a damning verdict on Manchester United's decision to raise matchday ticket prices at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Barcelona in talks over Ansu Fati exit ahead of potential Marcus Rashford bid
arts.sum: Barcelona are in talks over loaning Ansu Fati to Ajax, which would free them up to bid for Man Utd's Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Christopher Nkunku hope after ‘NO CHANCE’ message
arts.sum: Man Utd have looked a strong option for Nkunku, but they have been told the only way they could sign the versatile attacker permanently would be to strike a deal with Chelsea for Alejandro Garnacho. “Manchester United have looked into the possibility of a deal for Christopher Nkunku, but there would only be a loan,” Sky Sports News transfer expert Dharmesh Sheth reported.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville claims Man Utd trying to 'force out Marcus Rashford' as he explains comments
arts.sum: As the saga around Marcus Rashford's future at Manchester United continues to unravel, Gary Neville offered his take on the reason why Ruben Amorim has aired the dirty laundry publicly

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes desperate plea to Marcus Rashford over Man Utd exile
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim pleads with Marcus Rashford to raise his standards and help Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney reveals private Marcus Rashford talks amid 'embarrassing' Man Utd plight
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford continues to be exiled by Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim, with former United skipper Wayne Rooney claiming the forward must leave to salvage his career
